description_long: This house features a rectangular brick structure with a dark gabled roof and a prominent front facade. The front side displays three large entryways, one of which is a wide garage-style opening, and above the main entrance is a sign reading 'Kaspar Hollo.' The brickwork is consistent across all sides, with the roof extending symmetrically over the length of the building. Windows are minimal, with only a single large window visible on each gable end, and there are no visible decorative elements or landscaping. The house sits on a flat, paved surface, and a small, colorful vehicle is parked nearby, suggesting a utilitarian or garage function. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on accessibility and durability.
description: A rectangular brick house with a dark gabled roof, large front entryways, and minimal windows, set on a paved surface.
description_view_0: Side gable view showing a large window and the brick exterior, with the roof sloping down and a vehicle parked nearby.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting three large entryways, a sign above the main entrance, and the vehicle in front.
description_view_2: Opposite gable end with a single large window and no visible entryways, showing the brickwork and roof.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and the full expanse of the gabled roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal, single large windows on gable ends
attribute_entryway_design: Three large front entryways including a wide garage-style door, no porch or decorative elements, with a sign above the main entrance.
